rationale: Scope is airtight: exactly six in-scope files; git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ empty; no internal/approve, docs, ADR, or skill edits; BranchExistsE and show-ref fences 0-hit. The executor hunk is verifiably comment-only — every -/+ line is comment text; the `if guardErr := guardMergeLayout(...)` line is unchanged context (AC8 pair holds). F3-1 honored: uncoveredPendingObligations is a NEW unexported helper; CheckPendingObligations is a thin exported wrapper; reconcilePendingRefutations calls the helper with completeGetMetadataFn — never the erroring predicate — and its refuse-message strings are byte-identical to the old inline ones. F2-2 honored: no bare PanelGateRoots grep anywhere in the bead's verification (plan mandates func-def-scoped; pre-existing TestPanelGateRoots_LayoutAware substring noted, not a defect). Grounding resolves: ADR-0030 names approve/complete the enforcement packages and executor the I/O boundary (comment faithful); executor :383/:385 citations exact; three wrapper consumers at cited sites; Plan L533-535 is a carried-over pre-existing 114 citation. No contradiction: bool probe unchanged, no exit-code classifier, core added not replacing, writePanelRefutedMetadata's sole production caller is still reconcile (single settlement home). AC12 deviation preserves Fact 2 — the orphan commit would ride spec-to-main, so ancestor-of-main plus tell-tale-file still discriminate. Four named tests pass -count=1; build and gofmt clean.

findings.note: Six files only; no approve/gitutil/docs; negative fences 0-hit; git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ empty; executor change comment-only with guardMergeLayout call line as unchanged context.

Shared core is unexported uncoveredPendingObligations; reconcile re-expressed over it (not over the erroring CheckPendingObligations); reconcile refuse messages byte-identical to prior inline strings.
No bare grep 'PanelGateRoots' discriminator in the bead's diff or plan verification; TestPanelGateRoots_LayoutAware (panel_gate_layout_test.go:74) pre-exists at base as the plan warned.

Executor comment's ADR-0030 claim faithful to .mindspec/adr/ADR-0030-executor-boundary.md; o4fd OQ1/OQ4 grounded in spec.md; test-file line citations (:383 List, :385 HasPrefix) resolve; consumers at complete.go:111 / next.go:459 / doctor/orphaned_beads.go:16 untouched.

branchExistsFn = gitutil.BranchExists unchanged bool probe (consumed at orphans.go:143); no exit-code classifier; error-preserving core added alongside preserved fail-open wrapper (mixed-list parity by (orphans, firstErr) return); single settlement home retained.

Reworked subtest (a) still pins Fact 2: an unenumerated bead ref merged by a regressed loop would reach main via the finalize spec-to-main merge, tripping both the IsAncestor-of-main check and the tell-tale orphan.txt check; not weakened.
go build OK; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; all four named tests pass -count=1; new test files are insertion-only (227+0, 123+0); worktree clean apart from the panel's own review dir.
